# Your graduate careers hub

* [Log in](/login)
* [Post a job](https://www.targetconnect.com/employers)

# Your graduate careers hub

Whether you're looking for careers[advice](/careers-advice) from industry experts, or [graduate jobs & schemes,](/graduate-jobs) [internships](/internships) and [events](/events) from leading employers - launch your career with targetjobs.

[Search jobs](/search/jobs)

+ AI powered

See where your skills can take you

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='336'%20width='508'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](data:image/png;base64,)

[Find your career match](/career-inspiration)

READY TO APPLY?

## Let’s get you hired

From start-up roles to established grad schemes, we've got you. You can search for trending opportunities and see the latest roles posted on targetjobs below.

[Graduate jobs & schemes](/graduate-jobs)[Internships](/internships)[Law graduate jobs](/graduate-jobs/law)[Marketing internships](/internships/marketing)[Finance graduate jobs & schemes](/graduate-jobs/finance)[All jobs & opportunities](/search/jobs?search=)

Leeds

£26,436.8

22 days to apply](/jobs/graduate-data-engineer-databricks-pyspark-228918)[BDO

Glasgow, Edinburgh

£28,000

2 days to apply](/jobs/2026-audit-graduate-programme-scotland-228902)[Office for National Statistics

### Operational Support Manager

Newport, Titchfield

£34,587

14 days to apply](/jobs/operational-support-manager-228866)[ASMPT

Weymouth

15 days to apply](/jobs/graduate-human-resources-228860)[British Land

### Retail & Logistics Marketing Executive

27 days to apply](/jobs/retail-logistics-marketing-executive-228854)[Cleary Gottlieb Steen & Hamilton LLP

### Client Account Analyst

London

£38,000

17 days to apply](/jobs/client-account-analyst-228832)

## Careers advice by sector

Our comprehensive careers advice is designed to empower you with the knowledge, tools and insights needed to excel in your chosen field.

## Hear directly from employers

Get messaged by employers looking for people with your skills and experiences.

Discover opportunities you’re a great fit for. You might be surprised!

## Stand out and get discovered

Help employers get to know you! Use our profile builder to boost your visibility and increase your chances of landing that perfect opportunity.

[Get discovered](/register)

No matter what stage you're at

## Give yourself an edge

There’s no wrong time to start planning your career. Whatever stage you’re at, our expert team are here with the advice, tools and opportunities you need.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='794'%20width='1299'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

[### Advice for school leavers

Discover the world of options open to you on finishing school or college and get tips on how to make the right decision for you.](/careers-advice/advice-for-school-leavers)[### CVs, applications and tests

Find the tools and tips you need to help you apply for graduate jobs or internships. We cover every aspect of the application process, from writing a CV to answering online application questions and sitting psychometric tests.](/careers-advice/cvs-applications-and-tests)[### Career ideas

Find advice for figuring out your dream career, including what options are available to you after graduating and how to choose the right graduate role.](/careers-advice/career-ideas)[### Finding a job

Finding a job isn’t always as easy as it sounds. Here we help you to jump potential hurdles, giving essential advice for home and international students: from applying in tough economic times to getting a top graduate job with a 2.2.](/careers-advice/finding-a-job)[### Internships

Completing an internship allows you to sharpen your skills, improve your CV, prepare for the world of work and potentially land yourself a graduate job. Discover what internships actually involve, how to apply for them and how to make the most of them.](/careers-advice/internships)[### Interviews and assessment centres

You impressed on paper; now it’s time to show the employer in person that you’re the right hire. Learn how to do this with our expert advice for answering interview questions, developing interview techniques and acing assessment centre exercises.](/careers-advice/interviews-and-assessment-centres)[### Job descriptions

Discover the qualifications, skills and experience you’ll need for more than 300 job roles and find one you’ll love.](/careers-advice/job-descriptions)[### Job offers and working life

Job offers, rejection emails and stepping into the working world with your first graduate job can pull you in a million directions. Fortunately, we’ve curated advice on how to accept job offers, bounce back from rejection and make an impact in your first job.](/careers-advice/job-offers-and-working-life)[### Skills for getting a job

Discover the skills that major graduate employers seek and how you can demonstrate them on your application form, and at interviews and assessment centres.](/careers-advice/skills-for-getting-a-job)[### University life

Wanting to leave uni with a degree is a given. But what do you want from the other bits of student life? Discover how to combine study, rest, work and play with our insights from students and graduates.](/careers-advice/university-life)

[Search careers advice](/search/advice)

Pathways

## Interactive e-learning

Get the insights and skills you need to shape your career journey. Learn directly from industry experts and young professionals with videos, quizzes and real-world activities. And the best news? It’s all free.

[Search Pathways](/pathways)

[![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='325'%20width='650'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

### How to develop a strong personal brand - and why you need one

Develop

By the end of this course, you’ll know how to create a ‘professional’ personal brand that is authentic to you while also supporting your career ambitions.

30m](/pathways/library/#/pathway/definition/65/overview)

[![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='325'%20width='650'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

### Creative ways to boost your CV without work experience

Get clued up on the skills and experiences you can add to your CV at your own pace and in your own time – internship or no internship.](/pathways/library/#/pathway/definition/59/overview)

[![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='325'%20width='650'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

### What a great master CV looks like - and why you need one

Apply

Learn what a great master CV looks like and how to quickly tailor it to individual employers, so you can give yourself an advantage in your applications.](/pathways/library/#/pathway/definition/15/overview)

[![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='325'%20width='650'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

### How to write a convincing cover letter

Apply

We’ll show you exactly what goes into a convincing cover letter, so you can give yourself the best chance of getting to the next stage of the application process.](/pathways/library/#/pathway/definition/19/overview)

[![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='325'%20width='650'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

### How to take the guesswork out of your interview prep

Apply

Get clued up on a range of challenging interview questions, so you can feel confident showcasing your skills and potential on the day.

30m](/pathways/library/#/pathway/definition/21/overview)

[Search Pathways](/pathways)

## Find everything from start-ups to grad schemes

Get industry-leading careers advice and opportunities from over 50,000 employers and 80+ universities.

[Top graduate employers](/search/employers)

## We've got you

Get the latest jobs, internships, careers advice, courses and graduate events based on what's important to you. Start connecting directly with top employers today.

[Join targetjobs](/register)
